scripts.build: node --input-type=module -e 'import fs from "node:fs/promises"; import path from "node:path"; const cwd = process.cwd(); const pickExport = (entry) => { if (typeof entry === "string") return entry; if (entry && typeof entry === "object") return entry.style ?? entry.default ?? entry.import ?? entry.require ?? null; return null; }; const resolveStylesheet = async (id, base) => { if (id.startsWith(".") || id.startsWith("/")) return path.resolve(base, id); const parts = id.split("/"); const packageName = id.startsWith("@") ? parts.slice(0, 2).join("/") : parts[0]; const subpath = id.startsWith("@") ? parts.slice(2).join("/") : parts.slice(1).join("/"); const packageDir = path.join(cwd, "node_modules", packageName); const pkg = JSON.parse(await fs.readFile(path.join(packageDir, "package.json"), "utf8")); const exportKey = subpath ? "./" + subpath : "."; const exported = pickExport(pkg.exports?.[exportKey]); const fallback = subpath ? "./" + subpath : pkg.main ?? "index.css"; return path.resolve(packageDir, exported ?? fallback); }; const entry = path.join(cwd, "src/styles/globals.css"); const input = await fs.readFile(entry, "utf8"); const tailwind = await import("file://" + path.join(cwd, "node_modules", "tailwindcss", "dist", "lib.mjs")); const compiled = await tailwind.compile(input, { from: entry, loadStylesheet: async (id, base) => { const file = await resolveStylesheet(id, base); return { path: file, base: path.dirname(file), content: await fs.readFile(file, "utf8") }; } }); const css = compiled.build([]); await fs.mkdir(path.join(cwd, "dist"), { recursive: true }); await fs.writeFile(path.join(cwd, "dist/globals.css"), css);'
